question: If I need to manipulate the two kinds of engine switches on the jetski, what should I do?
content:
Use them this way:
1. To stop the engine normally, push the red engine stop switch on the handlebar.<PIC>
2. Before starting, attach the engine shut-off cord to your wrist and insert the clip on the cord under the black engine shut-off switch.<PIC>
3. If the clip is pulled out, such as if the operator falls off, the engine stops automatically; with the clip removed, the engine will not start. Remove the clip whenever the engine is not running to prevent accidental starting or unauthorized use.
ret:
"Use them this way:
1. To stop the engine normally, push the red engine stop switch on the handlebar.<PIC>
2. Before starting, attach the engine shut-off cord to your wrist and insert the clip on the cord under the black engine shut-off switch.<PIC>
3. If the clip is pulled out, such as if the operator falls off, the engine stops automatically; with the clip removed, the engine will not start. Remove the clip whenever the engine is not running to prevent accidental starting or unauthorized use.",["Manual20_43", "Manual20_44"]

evidence_refs.notes: Defines the red engine stop switch, the black engine shut-off switch, the clip/cord, automatic stopping when the clip is removed, and the warning to attach/remove the cord correctly.
States that the engine will not start when the clip is removed from the engine shut-off switch.

notes: The question refers to the WaveRunner/jetski engine stop switch and engine shut-off switch. Two images are used because the manual has separate adjacent figures for the red stop switch and the shut-off switch clip/cord.
